product: AI Search supports selected text columns, sorting, and aggregations (Beta)
tagline: AI Search now supports query time options for full text and hybrid queries in Beta.
what_it_does: AI Search now supports query time options for full text and hybrid queries in Beta. You can limit keyword matching to selected text columns, sort results by columns indexed for sorting, and return aggregate counts for values and ranges. For details, see Search selected text columns, sort results, and return aggregations (Beta).
why_it_matters: In addition to improved security and access management, using service principals can improve performance by up to 100 msec per query.
key_takeaway: AI Search now supports query time options for full text and hybrid queries in Beta.
